title: Resource struct missing Debug derive
description:
lichen-node/src/dispatch.rs:178 defines:
```rust
#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
pub struct Resource {
    pub path: &'static [&'static [u8]],
    pub get: Option<Handler>,
    ...
}
```

Missing `Debug` derive. The `Handler` type alias (`fn(&Request) -> Response`) is Debug-printable (shows function pointer address), so deriving Debug would work and aid debugging dispatch table configuration.
